---
id: resolve-conflict
title: "Resolve a conflict"
description: "Resolve an open conflict by selecting the winning fact or providing a fresh replacement value. Resolution creates an immutable resolution fact (confidence=1.0) and a `stigmem:resolves` meta-fact, then marks the conflict as resolved. See spec §5.10."
sidebar_label: "Resolve a conflict"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/stigmem-reference-node
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Resolve a conflict"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/conflicts/{conflict_id}/resolve"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Resolve an open conflict by selecting the winning fact or providing a fresh replacement value. Resolution creates an immutable resolution fact (confidence=1.0) and a `stigmem:resolves` meta-fact, then marks the conflict as resolved. See spec §5.10.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
